g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the transport search step')
sendPrompt('How does transport type selection work?')
sendPrompt('What does the vehicle catalog look like?')
sendPrompt('What filters are on the vehicle list?')
sendPrompt('What does the booking form contain?')
sendPrompt('How are hotels displayed and filtered?')
sendPrompt('What does the hotel detail page show?')
sendPrompt('What does the accommodation booking form have?')
sendPrompt('What does the accommodation confirmation include?')
